description: 目標語系詞彙與搭配層任務包：功能詞塊、搭配、語域標記

tasks.desc: Define vocab/collocation contract with function-first lexical units.
Define collocation schema (core phrase, variants, anti-patterns, register).
Map collocation layer to function IDs and pattern IDs.
Add generator selection rules for collocation-aware surface realization.
Implement gate checks for invalid/unnatural collocations.
Pilot on KO A1/A2 2 units and compare output naturalness.
